positive: A stunning, highly detailed cosmic botanical arrangement centered on a single, gracefully twisting celestial fern. The design features bioluminescent flora, geometric constellations forming arcs around deep indigo night sky elements, and metallic gold lines outlining the petal edges. Use high contrast, stark white and gold elements against a midnight blue background. The style should be a seamless fusion of Art Nouveau elegance and cosmic scientific illustration, rendered with thick, graphic silhouettes and clean linework, suitable for direct transfer to apparel. Central composition, symmetrical balance, ethereal lighting.
negative: low detail, blurry, grain, noisy, text, watermark, signature, logo, dirty, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, sketch, realistic photo, gradient colors, clutter
